2026-0422
2026-05-07PCHCanadian Race Relations Foundation ActReappointment of a director of the Board of Directors of the Canadian Race Relations FoundationReappointment of Dakota Kochie of Gatineau, Quebec, as a director of the Board of Directors of the Canadian Race Relations Foundation, to hold office during pleasure on a part-time basis for a term of four years, effective May 27, 2026.N/A
subject: Reappointment of a director of the Board of Directors of the Canadian Race Relations Foundation
precis: Reappointment of Dakota Kochie of Gatineau, Quebec, as a director of the Board of Directors of the Canadian Race Relations Foundation, to hold office during pleasure on a part-time basis for a term of four years, effective May 27, 2026.
